title: Unnai Kan Thedhudhe Lyrics-Va Quarter Cutting song lyrics
stanzas:
Singer  : GV Prakash Kumar, Gana Ulaganathan 
Song   : Unnai Kan Thedhudhe
Movie : Va Quarter Cutting
Lyrics : Kumararaja, Shiva

Unnai kan thedhudhe ullam nadudhe
Unnai kan kanaamal paradhodudhe
Kudi kudiyai theriyumadeee...
Aanalum kudika pidikumadi ..
Mabbu kicku boostu takkaru
Quarteru matter kidakalaye ..
ahre haayiiii..

Unnai kan thedhudhe ullam nadudhe
Unnai kan kanaamal paradhodudhe

Kalyaani ragam illa
Iyaiyaiyo pichu pichu odharuraye
Samiyaarthan yaagamilla
Pinni poo vachi ribbon kooda suthuraye

Kalyaani ragam illa
Samiyaarthan yaagamilla
Maanidar thaan yedhayum kandukala

Kele thatti mele thirugi
Adhuthan sorgam pogum vali
Kunijan pirandhu nimindhan manushan
Pidicha gnana purusanadee.
Mabbu kicku boostu takkaru
Quarteru matter kidakalaye ..
ahre haayiiii..

Unnai kan thedhudhe ullam nadudhe
Unnai kan kanaamal paradhodudhe
Kudi kudiyai theriyumadeee...
Aanalum kudika pidikumadi ..

Ye quarter quarter quarter quarter quarter ..
Ye quarter quarter quarter quarter quarter..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song captures the excitement and carefree spirit of youth, celebrating love and enjoyment.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Va Quarter Cutting, the song reflects the fun and lively moments shared by the characters, enhancing the film's comedic elements.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the voices of Gana Ulaganathan and GV Prakash Kumar, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar himself.

When was the song released?

Unnai Kan Thedhudhe was released on September 3, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unnai Kan Thedhudhe, the lively duet encapsulates the essence of youthful exuberance and carefree love. The song plays during a pivotal moment in Va Quarter Cutting, where the characters celebrate life and relationships. With its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and excitement. The collaboration between Gana Ulaganathan and GV Prakash Kumar adds a unique charm, making it a memorable track for any celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnai Kan Thedhudhe from Va Quarter Cutting is a vibrant celebration of youthful energy and fun. This catchy duet features the dynamic voices of Gana Ulaganathan and GV Prakash Kumar, perfectly complemented by GV Prakash's lively music. Get ready to groove to the infectious beats that make this song a party anthem!
stanzaMeanings: I am searching for you, my heart is restless. Without seeing you, I feel lost. I know about the drinking crowd... but I still like to drink.
I am searching for you, my heart is restless. Without seeing you, I feel lost.
There is no melody of love. It's all just chaos. There is no ritual for the gods. Even the flowers are tied with ribbons and thrown around.
There is no melody of love. There is no ritual for the gods. Humans just wander around aimlessly.
Hitting the ground and turning back, that's the way to heaven. A child is born, and a human is left behind. A wise person is caught. But I still like to drink.
I am searching for you, my heart is restless. Without seeing you, I feel lost. I know about the drinking crowd... but I still like to drink.
Quarter, quarter, quarter, quarter, quarter... Quarter, quarter, quarter, quarter, quarter...
